title: cyathea rubiginosa
intro: Cyathea rubiginosa, also known as the rusty feather fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyathea rubiginosa include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for wound healing and skin conditions. Cyathea rubiginosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in topical creams and ointments for its skin-soothing properties.
